ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Average loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode (major or minor) of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "category" TEXT /* Genre category of the track */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album name of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number in the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Main genre of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image" TEXT /* Image of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborators (comma-separated user IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (free, premium) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user listening to the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track that was listened to */,
  "listened_date" TEXT /* Date the track was listened to */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track played in milliseconds */,
  "playback_device" TEXT /* Device used for playback (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric record */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated track */,
  "total_plays" INTEGER /* Total number of plays for the track */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the track */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares for the track */,
  "skips" INTEGER /* Total number of skips for the track */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Total number of dislikes for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "replies" TEXT /* List of replies (comma-separated comment IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liked_tracks" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liked track record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track liked by the user */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liked_tracks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liked_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the subscription */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription is set for auto-renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., artist, administrator) */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the role (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
